query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m') as month,
  SUM(CASE WHEN strategy IN ('cc', 'csp') THEN premium_collected ELSE 0 END) as total_premium,
  COUNT(*) as order_count
FROM orders
WHERE status = 'filled'
  AND created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 12 MONTH)
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(created_at, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month;
